lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਗਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: naanak vin naavai dhrig mohu jit lag dukh paaeaa |32|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the Name, those loving attachments are cursed; engrossed in them, he suffers in pain. ||32||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਵੈਰ ਵਿਰੋਧੁ ਕੋ ਸਕੈ ਨ ਛਡਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ant hovai vair virodh ko sakai na chhaddaaeaa |
lines.english: In the end, hatred and conflict well up, and no one can save him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਖਾਧੈ ਸਭ ਭੁਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh amrit naam hai jit khaadhai sabh bhukh jaae |
lines.english: The Guru's Word is the Ambrosial Nectar of the Naam. Eating it, all hunger departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa mool na hovee naam vasai man aae |
lines.english: There is no thirst or desire at all, when the Naam comes to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਸ ਕਸ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਲਾਹਣਾ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ras kas sabad salaahanaa aape le milaae |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, whoever takes the Praise of the Shabad as his spices and flavors - the Lord unites him in His Union. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਜਿ ਹੋਰੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਤਿਤੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਲਗੈ ਤਨਿ ਧਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai ji hor khaanaa tith rog lagai tan dhaae |
lines.english: Eating anything other than the Name, disease runs to afflict the body.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਹ ਮੇਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jeea andar jeeo sabad hai jit seh melaavaa hoe |
lines.english: The life within all living beings is the Word of the Shabad. Through it, we meet our Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਜਗਿ ਆਨੑੇਰੁ ਹੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai jag aanaer hai sabade paragatt hoe |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, the world is in darkness. Through the Shabad, it is enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਡਿਤ ਮੋਨੀ ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਥਕੇ ਭੇਖ ਥਕੇ ਤਨੁ ਧੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: panddit monee parr parr thake bhekh thake tan dhoe |
lines.english: The Pandits, the religious scholars, and the silent sages read and write until they are weary. The religious fanatics are tired of washing their bodies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਦੁਖੀਏ ਚਲੇ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai kinai na paaeo dukhee chale roe |
lines.english: Without the Shabad, no one attains the Lord; the miserable depart weeping and wailing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਰਮਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak nadaree paaeeai karam paraapat hoe |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, by His Glance of Grace, the Merciful Lord is attained. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਸਦਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਚਲਸੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: disadaa sabh kichh chalasee mere prabh bhaaeaa |
lines.english: All that is seen shall pass away. This is the Will of my God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸਤ੍ਰੀ ਪੁਰਖੈ ਅਤਿ ਨੇਹੁ ਬਹਿ ਮੰਦੁ ਪਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eisatree purakhai at nehu beh mand pakaaeaa |
lines.english: The husband and wife are very much in love; sitting together, they make evil plans.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਚਾਕਰੀ ਥਿਰੁ ਕੰਧੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee chaakaree thir kandh sabaaeaa |
lines.english: Working for the Perfect Guru, the wall becomes permanent and stable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਰਹੀਐ ਥਿਰੁ ਜਗਿ ਕੋ ਕਢਹੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kiau raheeai thir jag ko kadtahu upaaeaa |
lines.english: How can anyone remain in this world forever? Some may try to devise a plan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: naanak bakhas milaaeian har naam samaaeaa |33|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord forgives them, and merges them into Himself; they are absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਭਉ ਹੇਤੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi visaariaa gur kaa bhau het apaar |
lines.english: Attached to Maya, the mortal forgets the Fear of God and Guru, and love for the Infinite Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿਨਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਦਰਗਹ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jinaa sabad man vasai daragah mokh duaar |
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad abides in the mind of the Gurmukhs, who find the Gate of Salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭਿ ਲਹਰਿ ਸੁਧਿ ਮਤਿ ਗਈ ਸਚਿ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: lobh lehar sudh mat gee sach na lagai piaar |
lines.english: The waves of greed take away his wisdom and understanding, and he does not embrace love for the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਜੀਵਣਾ ਵਿਸਰੇ ਸਰੈ ਨ ਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: naanak jis bin gharree na jeevanaa visare sarai na bind |
lines.english: O Nanak, without Him, we could not live for a moment. Forgetting Him, we could not succeed for an instant.

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਏ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak aape mel le aape bakhasanahaar |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord Himself forgives them, and unites them in Union with Himself. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਕਿਉ ਮਨ ਰੂਸੀਐ ਜਿਸਹਿ ਹਮਾਰੀ ਚਿੰਦ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tis siau kiau man rooseeai jiseh hamaaree chind |2|
lines.english: O mortal, how can you be angry with the One who cares for you? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਵਣੁ ਆਇਆ ਝਿਮਝਿਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: saavan aaeaa jhimajhimaa har guramukh naam dhiaae |
lines.english: The rainy season of Saawan has come. The Gurmukh meditates on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਕਾੜਾ ਸਭੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਸੀ ਮੀਹੁ ਵੁਠਾ ਛਹਬਰ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh bhukh kaarraa sabh chukaaeisee meehu vutthaa chhahabar laae |
lines.english: All pain, hunger and misfortune end, when the rain falls in torrents.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਧਰਤਿ ਭਈ ਹਰੀਆਵਲੀ ਅੰਨੁ ਜੰਮਿਆ ਬੋਹਲ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh dharat bhee hareeaavalee an jamiaa bohal laae |
lines.english: The entire earth is rejuvenated, and the grain grows in abundance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਚਿੰਤੁ ਬੁਲਾਵੈ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਪਾਵੈ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har achint bulaavai kripaa kar har aape paavai thaae |
lines.english: The Carefree Lord, by His Grace, summons that mortal whom the Lord Himself approves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਹੁ ਜੁ ਅੰਤੇ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har tiseh dhiaavahu sant janahu ju ante le chhaddaae |
lines.english: So meditate on the Lord, O Saints; He shall save you in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੈ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਵਸੈ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: har keerat bhagat anand hai sadaa sukh vasai man aae |
lines.english: The Kirtan of the Lord's Praises and devotion to Him is bliss; peace shall come to dwell in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਰਾਧਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਦੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa guramukh naam araadhiaa tinaa dukh bhukh leh jaae |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who worship the Naam, the Name of the Lord - their pain and hunger departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੈ ਗਾਇ ਗੁਣ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਦੇਹੁ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak tripatai gaae gun har darasan dehu subhaae |3|
lines.english: Servant Nanak is satisfied, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. Please embellish him with the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਨਿਤ ਦੇਵੈ ਚੜੈ ਸਵਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee daat nit devai charrai savaaeea |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru bestows His gifts, which increase day by day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਉਸ ਦੀ ਰੀਸ ਸਿਰਿ ਛਾਈ ਪਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: je ko kare us dee rees sir chhaaee paaeea |
lines.english: If anyone tries to challenge him, the Lord throws dust on his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਵਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਉਨਮਨਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai kaval pragaas unaman liv laaeea |
lines.english: The heart-lotus blossoms forth, and the mortal is lovingly absorbed in the state of supreme bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਸਿ ਦੇਵੈ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਨ ਛਪੈ ਛਪਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: tus devai aap deaal na chhapai chhapaaeea |
lines.english: The Merciful Lord Himself bestows them; they cannot be concealed by concealment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਪੜਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸਕਈ ਪੂਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aparr koe na sakee poore satigur kee vaddiaaeea |34|
lines.english: O Nanak, no one can equal the glory of the Perfect True Guru. ||34||
